title: ilex umbellata
intro: Ilex umbellata, also known as the umbrella holly, is a deciduous shrub native to eastern North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, as well as its ability to act as a diuretic and astringent. The health benefits of Ilex umbellata include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, Ilex umbellata can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to promote overall well-being and address specific health concerns.
